attributes.description: Alerts when `postgresql.bgwriter.maxwritten > 0`. bgwriter stopped because it hit the per-round write ceiling — structural write pressure.
attributes.name: [PostgreSQL OTel] Bgwriter maxwritten stops

investigation_guide.blob:
## PostgreSQL bgwriter maxwritten stops

### What fired
`bgwriter.maxwritten` increased during the window.

### Why it matters
Bgwriter stops writing when it exceeds `bgwriter_lru_maxpages` in a round. Sustained stops mean the write workload exceeds bgwriter capacity.

### Triage
1. Check `bgwriter_delay` and `_maxpages`.

### Remediation
- Tune bgwriter more aggressively.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Bgwriter stopped because it wrote too many buffers; indicates write pressure
| WHERE postgresql.bgwriter.maxwritten IS NOT NULL
| EVAL maxwritten_val = TO_DOUBLE(postgresql.bgwriter.maxwritten)
| WHERE maxwritten_val > 0
| STATS maxwritten_count = SUM(maxwritten_val) BY service.instance.id
| WHERE maxwritten_count > 0
